title: abutilon alii
intro: Abutilon alii, also known as Ma'o hau hele, is a flowering plant native to Hawaii, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and delicate foliage. The plant has been used in traditional Hawaiian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Abutilon alii include its ability to treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne, reduce inflammation, and soothe wounds. Abutilon alii is typically prepared as a tea, ointment, or salve, and is also used in topical applications for its therapeutic properties.
